_meta.description: D6 fixtures for strands / declarative-json-render. The dedicated /byoc-json-render StrandsAgent (src/agents/byoc_json_render.py) emits the @json-render/react flat-spec envelope { root, elements } consumed by the demo renderer (json-render-renderer.tsx) against a Zod-validated catalog (MetricCard + BarChart + PieChart). A MetricCard root nests the charts via its children array. Keyed on the exact suggestion-pill prompts (declarative-json-render/suggestions.ts). These supersede the legacy byoc.json render_dashboard/{metrics,charts} shape, which the json-render renderer cannot parse.

fixtures._comment: Sales dashboard pill — MetricCard root with a BarChart child. Renders [data-testid=metric-card] + [data-testid=bar-chart].

match.userMessage: Show me the sales dashboard with metrics and a revenue chart

fixtures._comment: Revenue by category pill — MetricCard root with a PieChart child.

match.userMessage: Break down revenue by category as a pie chart

fixtures._comment: Expense trend pill — MetricCard root with a BarChart child of monthly expenses.

match.userMessage: Show me monthly expenses as a bar chart
